name: naval
description: A Naval Ravikant Almanack skill pack with n-prefixed skills for wealth, judgment, happiness, health, values, reading, and life-review workflows.

interface.longDescription: Naval packages The Almanack of Naval Ravikant into searchable n-prefixed Codex skills, shared references, router guidance, a browsable skill catalog, coverage checks, and practical workflows for turning the book's ideas into decisions, audits, experiments, and daily practice.
